name: envision-claude-marketplace
description: Envision-Construction's Claude Code plugin registry. Plugins listed here are forks/controls owned by the org, separated from upstream merge timing.

plugins.name: nano-banana-2
plugins.description: Google Gemini Nano Banana 2 image generation via MCP (Envision-Construction fork of daveremy/nano-banana-2-mcp). Patched: inner marketplace.json removed.

plugins.name: envision-insurance
plugins.description: Forensic insurance research: captive formation and IRS enforcement (831(b)/T.D. 10029), cell structures, coverage lapses, premium finance. Skill + 4 specialist agents, primary-source citation discipline. First-party.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Deep research harness: decompose a question into 5 search angles, fan-out web searches, fetch up to 15 deduped sources, extract falsifiable claims, adversarially verify every claim (3 checks, 2/3 refutations kill), synthesize a confidence-ranked cited report. General-purpose port of Claude Code's built-in deep-research workflow. First-party.
